checks.title: Platform detection
checks.recommendation: Verify platform-specific hardening profile is selected.

checks.title: Web runtime user least privilege
checks.recommendation: Run web workers as a dedicated non-root service account.

checks.title: Web root permissions
checks.recommendation: Ensure web root ownership and permissions are restricted.

checks.title: TLS private key permissions
checks.recommendation: Restrict private key access to root and service group only.

checks.title: Server fingerprinting disclosure controls
checks.evidence: No version-disclosure directives found in config
checks.recommendation: Suppress version and signature disclosure in server responses.

checks.title: Directory listing controls
checks.evidence: No directory listing directives found in config
checks.recommendation: Disable directory auto-indexing for public paths.

checks.title: Potentially risky HTTP method settings
checks.evidence: ols does not support TRACE by default
checks.recommendation: Disable TRACE and restrict unneeded methods.

checks.title: Security headers configuration presence
checks.evidence:
Detected headers in config: strict-transport-security, x-frame-options, x-content-type-options, referrer-policy, permissions-policy
Detected headers in live response (https://127.0.0.1/ status 403): strict-transport-security, x-frame-options, x-content-type-options, referrer-policy, permissions-policy
checks.recommendation: Configure HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, and CSP where applicable.

checks.title: Logging path availability
checks.recommendation: Ensure access and error logs are enabled and retained securely.

checks.title: Enabled module inventory
checks.recommendation: Disable unnecessary modules to reduce attack surface.

checks.title: Sensitive file indicators in web root
checks.evidence: No common sensitive filenames found in web root
checks.recommendation: Remove or block sensitive files from public document roots.

checks.title: OpenLiteSpeed WebAdmin exposure
checks.evidence: WebAdmin listener is restricted to localhost (127.0.0.1:7080)
checks.recommendation: Bind WebAdmin to localhost or management-only interfaces.

checks.title: OpenLiteSpeed example vhost or directory listing
checks.recommendation: Disable directory listing and remove sample/example vhost content.

checks.title: OpenLiteSpeed lacks HTTPS listener
checks.evidence: HTTPS listener is live on public binding(s): 0.0.0.0:443
checks.recommendation: Enable HTTPS listener and redirect HTTP to HTTPS.

checks.title: OpenLiteSpeed weak admin password
checks.evidence: OLS admin htpasswd present and no known weak default marker found.
checks.recommendation: Set a strong non-default admin password and store it securely.

cleanup_hint: Controller should delete uploaded script from /tmp after execution
